metadata.purpose: Section blueprints: per-section goal statement, super-propositions with evidence pointers, dependency graph. Drafted only after Level 1 is annotated and ratified, so section goals serve an approved thesis and arc.

schema_example.title: Application I: likelihood-ratio comparison
schema_example.goal_statement: One paragraph stating exactly what this section must convince the reader of, what it explicitly defers, and which thesis component it serves.

super_propositions.goal: state_result | define_concept | prove_sketch | evaluate_evidence | scope_limit | position_lineage
